message:
chore(beads): sync local issue tracker with rich integration tasks

Updates the .beads/issues.jsonl file with new development tasks related
to the planned rich_rust integration for enhanced console output.

The issue tracker now includes tasks for:
- OutputDispatcher module with mode detection (Human/Machine/Quiet)
- Theme system with semantic colors for proxy health and status
- Widget infrastructure for panels, tables, and progress indicators
- Per-command rich output integration (init, proxy, targets, status)
- Agent safety tests ensuring --json output remains parseable
- Terminal compatibility testing across truecolor/256/16/plain modes

These issues establish the roadmap for transforming rust_proxy's CLI
from basic terminal text to a visually polished experience while
maintaining full compatibility with AI coding agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
